qa_pair.question: What is the canvas width in pixels of the page that the report opens to by default?
How many visuals does the report contain in total across every page?
Of every visual in the report, which visual type occupies the largest pixel area on its page? Answer with the visual type identifier.
How many slicer visuals are placed across the entire report?
What hex color, including the leading hash, is registered as the first data series color in the report's custom theme?
How many distinct colors are defined in the data-color palette of the report's custom theme?
On the page whose display name is "Products", a single page-level filter is applied to one column. What is the name of that column?
The report has more than one bookmark. What is the display name of the bookmark that is listed second?
Does the report have a connected semantic model that the model-usage tool can analyse? Answer Yes or No.
One page in the report contains a tabular grid visual. What is the display name of that page?
